allow: PowerShell(ssh ubuntu@ns5038770.ip-148-113-228.net "pkill -f uvicorn; sleep 2 && cd /home/ubuntu/email-platform && nohup /home/ubuntu/email-platform/.venv/bin/uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --workers 4 > /tmp/fastapi.log 2>&1 & echo restarted")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://crm.vedsupost.com:8000/static/app.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "app.js size: $\($r.Content.Length\) chars"; if \($r.Content -match "openAddToListModal"\) { "Add Contacts feature: PRESENT" } else { "Add Contacts feature: MISSING" } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $body = '{"email":"admin@vedsupost.com","password":"admin123"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://crm.vedsupost.com:8000/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $token = \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).access_token; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://crm.vedsupost.com:8000/lists" -Headers $h -UseBasicParsing; $r2.Content } catch { $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
